text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The long-awaited Arima Kinen is here. Kitasan
Black and Satono Diamond's dream of racing
together in a G1 race is on the cusp of becoming
reality.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What's more, Tokai Teio's surprise entry has
turned this race into the ultimate end-of-year
festival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her best friend and her idol. Kitasan Black's
unforgettable dream race gets underway with a
truly incomparable lineup of rivals!
